title: LEGISLATIVE POWER CHAMBER OF DEPUTIES

title: EXECUTIVE BRANCH SECRETARY OF NATIONAL DEFENSE
description: Decree granting authorization to the President of the United Mexican States, to allow the departure of 73 (seventy-three) elements that make up the delegation of national troops outside the borders of the country, aboard a Boeing-727/ 264 aircraft,in order to participate in the commemoration of the "XLV Anniversary of the Constitution of the Nicaraguan Army", in the city of Managua, Nicaragua, between August 28, 2024 and September 4, 2024.

title: Secretariat of Environment and Natural Resources
description: Agreement by which the hydrological basins and aquifers that correspond to the administrative units of the national and regional hydrological-administrative level of the National Water Commission are disclosed.

title: AUTONOMOUS BODIES NATIONAL ELECTORAL INSTITUTE
description: Agreement of the General Council of the National Electoral Institute, which responds to the writings submitted by the citizens Elizabeth Karina Carreño Cázarez, Luz Elena Morales Carrillo, Juventino Mejía Labastida, Sergio Jaimes Lozano, Dora María Menéndez Arce, María del Carmen Fernández Fuentes, Gizeh Linares Sáez, María Magdalena Ramírez Salas, Sergio Barrera Acosta, Claudia Díaz Garay, Juan Bernardo Martínez Ventura and Jesús Ángel Cortez Valdez, who request the registration ofand candidacies for positions of popular election under the figure of unregistered candidacy.

title: AUTONOMOUS BODIES NATIONAL ELECTORAL INSTITUTE
description: Agreement of the General Council of the National Electoral Institute approving the designation of the people who will serve as moderators, as well as the definitive scale for the third debate to the Presidency of the Republic of the Federal Electoral Process 2023-2024.

title: AUTONOMOUS BODIES NATIONAL ELECTORAL INSTITUTE
description: Circular by which it is communicated to the dependencies and entities of the Federal Public Administration, to the Attorney General's Office, to the productive companies of the State, as well as to the federal entities, municipalities and public entities ofto each other, and to persons of federal public law with autonomy derived from the Political Constitution of the United Mexican States, who must refrain from accepting proposals or entering into contracts with the company Linemart Productos Insumos and TTR Services, Variable Capital Limited Liability Company.

title: AUTONOMOUS BODIES NATIONAL ELECTORAL INSTITUTE
description: Faith of errata to the Resolution of the General Council of the National Electoral Institute on the constitutional and legal origin of the modifications to the Declaration of Principles, the Action Program and the Statutes of the National Political Grouping calledFacing the Fourth Transformation, carried out in compliance with the second point of the resolution identified with INE/CG287/2023 and the first point of the resolution identified with INE/CG392/2023, as well as in the exercise of their freedom of self-organizationpublished on April 22, 2024.

title: AUTONOMOUS BODIES FEDERAL COURT OF ADMINISTRATIVE JUSTICE
